svg.text: Principle: load once per ICAO · independent modules · FlyWithLua loops
① INIT MODULE — Runs once at plugin startup
② AIRPORT DATA MODULE — Triggered by ICAO change (once per airport)
③ SIMBRIEF MODULE — Triggered on user request
④ PATHFINDING MODULE — Triggered by FM button (uses already-loaded graph)
⑤ CAR PHYSICS MODULE — Updated every frame (calculation only, no drawing)
⑥ ICAO MONITOR — Checks for airport change (~4x/sec)
If different → triggers Module ② Airport Data
⑦ RENDER MODULE — Display only (no calculation)
⑧ CLEANUP MODULE — Runs once at plugin shutdown
Dashed = FlyWithLua loop always active | Solid = single execution | → = data transfer between modules
⑤ do_every_frame · ⑥ do_often · ⑦ do_every_draw are X-Plane loops — CALCULATION and RENDERING are strictly separated
